---
title: "R & Rstudio"
subtitle: "Books, tutorials, and notes on R, R Markdown, and Quarto."
description: "{{< var section.analysis >}}"
image: /images/analysis/test1.jpg
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing: 
  contents: "rstudio/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
---
